form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Finished off last preparation second of 9 at Randwick Kensington 3yo F Mdn December 5 over 1300m, a neck behind La Basilique carrying 57.5kg at $4.20. On debut fourth of 7 at Canterbury 3yo F Mdn November 14 over 1100m, 2 len behind Ernaux with 57kg at $5.50. Looks forward enough after a recent trial win. Everything points to a positive return.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Second-up today. Last start second last in a small field at Rosehill 3yo+ MDN-Sw on April 6 over 1100m, slow going 4.5 len behind Compensation carrying 57kg at $5. At only start last preparation led but faded 2nd of 10 at Warwick Farm Superf&M Mdn-Sw on September 24 over 1200m, 2 len behind Surf's Up with 58kg at $8. Needs something easier.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Soon after the start made contact with Loera.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Raced twice to date. When well in the market at debut, held ground to the line 2nd of 10 at Hawkesbury Prov Mdn-Sw on March 7 over 1100m, on a slow track; 1.75 len behind Blue Suede Hooves with 56.5kg at $1.85. Last start sat on the speed throughout before fading to run last of 8 at this track Super 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 28 over 1000m, on a slow track; 14 len behind Sir Les with 55.5kg at $7. Raced below expectations latest and prepared to risk here.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: On jumping, made contact with Frosty Bangers.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin. 3Lengths. Raced keenly in the early and middle stages.

form.formComment: Filly by Satono Aladdin making her first appearance. Finished sixth in a Warwick Farm trial over 816m on March 30. Prefer to see.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Filly by Satono Aladdin making her first appearance. Finished sixth in a Warwick Farm trial over 816m on March 30. Prefer to see.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after five months 5th of 8 at this track Super 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 28 over 1000m, slow going 6 len behind Sir Les with 55kg at $5.50. Previously second-up 3rd of 7 at Hawkesbury Super 3yo Mdn on September 6 over 1000m, 2.25 len behind Fierce carrying 56kg at $10. Has ability and can figure in the finish.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shortly after the start, hampered between Waveton and Our Lady Peace.
From the 100m to the 50m, shifted in slightly.
Held up from the 300m until the near the 150m.
Began awkwardly, shifted out and made contact with Hellabella.

form.formComment: Third race start. First start 5th of 8 at Kembla Grange 2yo Mdn-Sw on June 21 over 1000m, 5 len behind Lull carrying 55kg at $6. Returned from break 5th of 8 at Hawkesbury F&M Mdn on March 26 over 1100m, on a slow track; 1.5 len behind Ascot Green carrying 58kg at $1.80. Strips fitter and is sure to prove hard to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted in on jumping and bumped Liberty Calls.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Resumes from a spell. Not seen since she finished last of 9 at Gosford Super Mdn December 31 over 1200m, 9 len behind Fuadee carrying 53.5kg at $7.50. On debut second last of 7 at Rosehill F&M Mdn-Sw November 12 over 1200m, 5 len behind Plaintiff carrying 58kg at $6.50. Will take great benefit from this outing.

form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last campaign second last of 12 at Rosehill Super 3yo+ MDN-Sw October 29 over 1400m, soft track; 11 len behind Long Legs with 57kg at $31. Previously first up; fifth of 9 at Kembla Grange Super Mdn-Sw October 13 over 1300m, 5.5 len behind Aisle Two carrying 57kg at $3.10. Might be better off following this outing.
